title.en: China-to-Qatar Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入卡塔尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入卡達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Qatar QGOSM conformity requirements, Kahramaa grid-connection and Be Solar distributed solar specifications, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 240/415 V grid settings, and GCC GSO standards context — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与卡塔尔QGOSM合格评定要求、Kahramaa并网及Be Solar分布式太阳能规格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 240/415 V电网参数及GCC GSO标准背景——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與卡達QGOSM合格評定要求、Kahramaa併網及Be Solar分散式太陽能規格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 240/415 V電網參數及GCC GSO標準背景——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, QGOSM conformity scope determination, Kahramaa grid-connection approval, Be Solar equipment eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Qatar QGOSM Technical Regulations, Kahramaa grid-connection technical specifications, GSO/GCC standards adoption, QCDD fire-safety requirements, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、QGOSM合格评定范围裁定、Kahramaa并网批准、Be Solar设备资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行卡塔尔QGOSM技术法规、Kahramaa并网技术规格、GSO/GCC标准采纳状况、QCDD消防安全要求及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、QGOSM合格評定範圍裁定、Kahramaa併網批准、Be Solar設備資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行卡達QGOSM技術法規、Kahramaa併網技術規格、GSO/GCC標準採納狀況、QCDD消防安全要求及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Qatar, the key practical gaps are: (1) verifying whether the inverter falls within QGOSM's current regulated product list requiring a pre-shipment Certificate of Conformity; (2) IEC 62109-2 safety type-test evidence as explicitly required by Kahramaa's Technical Specifications for solar PV grid connection; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance; (4) IEC 62920 EMC evidence; and (5) firmware validation against Kahramaa's 50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V grid parameters. China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy Kahramaa's IEC-referenced grid-connection requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口卡塔尔时，主要实际差距包括：（1）核实逆变器是否属于QGOSM现行受监管产品清单范围，需提交装运前合格证书；（2）Kahramaa太阳能光伏并网技术规格明确要求的IEC 62109-2安全型式试验证据；（3）IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（4）IEC 62920 EMC证据；（5）针对Kahramaa 50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V电网参数的固件验证。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不满足Kahramaa的IEC并网要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口卡達時，主要實際差距包括：（1）核實逆變器是否屬於QGOSM現行受監管產品清單範圍，需提交裝運前合格證書；（2）Kahramaa太陽能光伏併網技術規格明確要求的IEC 62109-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）IEC 62116防孤島合規；（4）IEC 62920 EMC證據；（5）針對Kahramaa 50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V電網參數的韌體驗證。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不滿足Kahramaa的IEC併網要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
